reasoning: Emotional axis (60%): Strong pass. Warm gold + saturated emerald green read as bright, charming, Hyrule-appropriate jewelry. Design is inviting and toy-like — not grim or threatening. The color palette is exactly the saturated warm/cool complementary pairing the brief calls for. Minor deduction: the diamond/marquise silhouette skews angular rather than the round-friendly ideal, slightly reducing approachability. Score ~7.8. Technical axis (40%): Solid pass. 1px hard outlines are clearly present on the pendant body and chain links. Gold setting uses 3 distinct tones (highlight, midtone, shadow) with hard edges — no gradient blending. Gem facets follow the same limited-palette hard-shading discipline. Pixel grid alignment looks correct across zoom panels. Main concern: the chain uses diagonal runs which at intermediate zoom levels can suggest softness, though at target display size this is unlikely to register. Score ~8.0. Weighted composite: 0.6×7.8 + 0.4×8.0 = 4.68 + 3.20 = 7.88 → rounded 8. Denzi reference comparison: reference helmets confirm hard-outline + 2-3 tone hard-shading as the peer standard; candidate matches this technical discipline. Verdict: pass.
